messages.content: You are an autonomous driving agent. You have access to multi-view camera images of a vehicle: (1) front view (which you should focus on with the most attention) <image>, (2) front right view <image>, and (3) front left view <image>. Your task is to do your best to predict future waypoints for the vehicle over the next 10 timesteps (5 seconds at 0.5-second intervals), given the vehicle's intent inferred from the images. Provided are the previous ego vehicle status. Positive x means forward direction while positive y means leftwards. The data is presented in the format [x, y]:(t-2.0s) [-7.24, 0.13], Acceleration: X 0.80, Y -0.05 m/s^2, Velocity: X 2.60, Y 0.07 m/s, (t-1.5s) [-5.85, 0.11], Acceleration: X 1.02, Y 0.07 m/s^2, Velocity: X 3.08, Y 0.08 m/s, (t-1.0s) [-4.21, 0.07], Acceleration: X 1.08, Y 0.36 m/s^2, Velocity: X 3.65, Y 0.08 m/s, (t-0.5s) [-2.26, 0.02], Acceleration: X 1.24, Y 0.07 m/s^2, Velocity: X 4.28, Y 0.07 m/s, (t-0.0s) [0.0, 0.0], Acceleration: X 0.96, Y -0.16 m/s^2, Velocity: X 4.90, Y 0.08 m/s
